LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Fiend_Helmet.description: A basic leather helmet, with a young bighorner's skull affixed to the top for decoration. The skull has a red bullseye on it, most often worn by the fiends, a particularly vicious group of raiders originating from the Mojave wasteland. It doesn’t protect well, but looks quite intimidating, which is more important to most raiders anyway.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Fiend_Helmet.label: Raider Fiend Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Fiend_Warrior_Helmet.descrip: A basic leather helmet, with a young bighorner's skull affixed to the top for decoration. The skull has a red bullseye on it, most often worn by the fiends, a particularly vicious group of raiders originating from the Mojave wasteland. It doesn’t protect well, but looks quite intimidating, which is more important to most raiders anyway.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Fiend_Warrior_Helmet.label: Raider Fiend Warrior Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Fiend_Battle_Helmet.descript: A basic leather helmet, with a young bighorner's skull affixed to the top for decoration. The skull has a red bullseye on it, most often worn by the fiends, a particularly vicious group of raiders originating from the Mojave wasteland. It doesn’t protect well, but looks quite intimidating, which is more important to most raiders anyway.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Fiend_Battle_Helmet.label: Raider Fiend Battle Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Wastehound_Helmet.des: A helmet constructed of several pieces of heavy burlap crudely stitched together. It also includes eye protection that looks like it was torn from a gas mask and tufts of hair. Not very potent armor, but it does intimidate the foe quite well.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Blastmaster_Helmet.de: Comprised of a firefighter's helmet worn on top of a gas mask, the blastmaster helmet does provide decent protection and is often covered with fire-retardant substances.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Psycho_Tic_Helmet.des: A leather skull cap with goggles and handlebars jutting out of the sides of the head. It is not very protective, and its main use is intimidation.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Arclight_Helmet.descr: A repurposed welding mask. It offers fairly good protection from the front but leaves the back of the head virtually unprotected. It encourages its wearer to storm blindly at the enemy, as retreating becomes a bad, and often fatal, idea.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Arclight_Helmet.label: Raider Arclight Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Sack_Hood.description: A simple hood often worn by raiders. It provides barely any protection against bullets but is (barely) better than no helmet at all.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Sack_Hood.label: Sack Hood
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Armored_Raider_Skull_Gas_Mas: A gas mask fitted with a reinforced metal skull plate. The combination of functional protection and terrifying aesthetics makes this a favored piece of headgear among raider elites.
A weathered gas mask with a corroded skull plate attached. Despite its deteriorated condition, it still provides adequate protection and maintains the intimidating raider aesthetic.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Raider_Power_Armor_Helmet.de: A power armor helmet that has been crudely modified by raiders. The internal systems barely function, but it still provides excellent protection against most threats.
A makeshift power armor helmet assembled from salvaged parts. While not as protective as military-grade helmets, it's still far superior to conventional raider headgear.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Scabber_Power_Armor_Helmet.d: A heavily corroded power armor helmet covered in rust and decay. Despite its deteriorated appearance, the core structure remains solid and provides substantial protection.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Waster_Power_Armor_Helmet.de: A battle-worn power armor helmet showing signs of extensive use and makeshift repairs. While not pristine, it remains a formidable piece of protective gear.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Mrfuzzy_Power_Armor_Helmet.d: An unusual power armor helmet that has been modified with a Mr. Fuzzy mascot theme. Despite its absurd appearance, it provides the same protection as standard raider power armor helmets.
